notes: Fees from the Annual/Renewal fee table (p1). Forex from the Cross-Currency Markup table (p12). Finance from the Charges-on-Revolving-Credit table (p10). Enrichment (network/category/rewards/lounge/welcome/badge/apply_url) deferred to a follow-up pass and flagged needs_review on every card. Three fee rows (Zenith+, Lakshya, AU SPONT) came from a jumbled two-column extraction and are flagged fee_needs_review for a re-parse against the PDF; Traverse (NRI) and the monthly Business fee likewise. AU CA / AU CS were EXCLUDED (2026-07-01): no consumer product page on aubank.in; they appear only in the MITC fee/charge exception tables (internal/account-linked, not marketed retail cards).

bank_defaults.cash_advance: 2.5% of amount withdrawn, minimum Rs.500 (plus finance charges from withdrawal date)
bank_defaults.notes: Per-card forex is set on each card (merge reads pc.forex directly). Finance default 3.75%/mo (45% p.a.) unsecured; Zenith+ carries its own 1.99%/mo per-card. forex_exceptions/finance_exceptions intentionally EMPTY to avoid the norm() collision where 'Zenith' and 'Zenith+' both reduce to 'zenith'. Late-fee tiers not cleanly extracted -> needs_review.
